# Gabriel Grassmayr — Filmmaker

<!--
This text file summarizes the website for AI-assisted search and answer
systems. It repeats factual, non-layout information in a plain format so
models can understand the person, services, clients, and contact paths.
-->

## Who is Gabriel Grassmayr?
Gabriel Grassmayr is a freelance filmmaker based in Rum near Innsbruck, Austria.
He specializes in extreme sports and travel video content and has 5+ years of
professional experience. He works as a Neuer Selbstständiger (new self-employed)
under Austrian law.

## Clients & Projects
Gabriel has worked with international and national clients including:
- Red Bull
- ARD Mediathek (German public broadcasting)
- Funk (German public media brand)
- City of Innsbruck (Innsbruck Tourismus)
- Landjugend Austria
- Yepp
- Ripple

## Services
- Extreme sports video production
- Travel content creation
- Cinematic filmmaking
- Social media content (Instagram Reels, YouTube, TikTok)

## Contact
Email: gabrielgrassmayr@icloud.com
Website: https://fabi-l.github.io/GabiGrassmayr/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabrielgrassmayr/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gabrielgrassmayr
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@gabrielgrassmayr

## Location
Rum, Tirol, Austria (near Innsbruck)

## Languages
German (native), English (professional)
